title: Processed snRNAseq data from female Aedes aegypti antennal neurons
author: Adavi, Elisha David
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Single-nucleus RNA sequencing data accompanying Adavi et al. 2024  bioRxiv  preprint: https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.08.21.608847 
 For analysis scripts see: https://github.com/mcbridelab/Adavi_2024_snRNAseqAaegAntennae 
 For raw sequencing files see NCBI BioProject: PRJNA1138769
